vol_description: Example videos of testing sessions or stimuli

Description of Dataset 
Tasks: This data comes from ongoing experiments that examine children’s ability to assess the other people’s competencies at performing tasks. Children were shown a storybook and video on the computer, and asked to assess which of two people were more competent at buildings towers with blocks. 

Demographic info: 7-8 year-olds, 6 - 7 year olds.  

File types: .mov (Quicktime) video files, .doc coding manual, .csv coding sheets
Samples from Natalia Velez's Swist Kids study
